queries.q: Write an instrumentation spec for the new onboarding checklist before engineering starts building
Define the analytics events, triggers, and properties for the checkout redesign
We keep finding questions we can't answer because nothing was tracked. Audit the signup flow tracking and spec what's missing.
Engineering needs a tracking contract for the referral feature: event names, when they fire, what properties, and PII handling
We are migrating to Amplitude. Document the event taxonomy and user properties the new tool should receive.
Before launch, make sure measurement is in place: spec the events for the collaboration feature with a QA checklist
Draft the event tracking requirements for the mobile app's push notification opt-in flow
Spell out exactly which user actions in the editor we should log, with property types and example values
Product analytics for the trial flow are inconsistent across platforms. Write the spec that makes web and mobile fire the same events.
I need a data collection plan engineering can implement for the new search experience, including which properties count as PII
The events already exist. Now spec the dashboard the growth team will use to watch the funnel.
queries.notes: Visualization layer on top of existing events

queries.q: Define the variants, primary metric, and sample size for the onboarding experiment
queries.notes: Experiment-specific metrics and variants, not product-wide tracking

queries.q: The feature isn't specified yet. Write the requirements doc for the collaboration feature so we know what flows even exist.
queries.notes: No flows to instrument until the feature is specified

queries.q: Analyze last quarter's funnel data and tell me where users drop off
Our Segment integration is throwing 400 errors in production, help me debug it
Write the experiment readout for the tracking-consent banner test
Document what the exec KPI dashboard needs to display, with filters and who can access it
queries.notes: Dashboard requirements, not the event contract beneath it

queries.q: Summarize the survey results about feature discoverability into themes
Plan the catering for the data team offsite
Enumerate the edge cases and error states for the file sync feature ahead of QA planning
